atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 theme configuration directive. Defines design tokens that can be referenced throughout your styles.

atDirectives.name: @theme inline
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 inline theme directive. Defines theme tokens that are inlined into the CSS output.

atDirectives.name: @import
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 import directive for importing Tailwind CSS

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS layer directive for organizing styles into base, components, and utilities layers

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive for applying utility classes within custom CSS
